title: Fix EC2 Zephyr builder native_sim host bootstrap gap
description: Why this exists: during project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 validation, a fresh Ubuntu EC2 Zephyr builder could mount the prepared EBS cache and build qemu/R1 targets, but native_sim builds were blocked before compile because the host image lacked gcc, system CMake/pip, and passwordless sudo for bootstrap/cleanup. What needs to be done: make the fresh EC2 workflow noninteractive by selecting or preparing an AMI/user-data path with host build tools and passwordless sudo, or teach the builder scripts to avoid these assumptions. Acceptance criteria: a fresh us-east-2a builder with vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 can run native_sim direct tests and Twister without manual CMake workarounds, and can unmount/detach cleanly noninteractively.
